notes.heading: Install opens outside the app
notes.body: Install, update, repair, backup, restore, and stop tasks now launch in a real external command window so you can watch SteamCMD and PowerShell output directly.

notes.heading: Window stays readable
notes.body: The external command window pauses at the end of the task so you can read the final SteamCMD result before closing it.

notes.heading: Clearer in-app status
notes.body: The Console tab now tells you when a separate command window is active and points input back to that window.
